render_style_lock: STYLE LOCK: Gothic period live-action, mid-19th century; candlelight and lamplight, deep shadows, desaturated cool-warm palette; naturalistic film photography, one medium for all cast—no illustration, no modern detail.
performance_lock: PERFORMANCE LOCK: First-person confessional frame—the Narrator often leans toward and addresses an unseen accuser/implied camera when in the confession room; flashback scenes use objective staging where characters look at each other and scene action, not the viewer. Heightened nervous energy and controlled calm alternate in the confessor’s address.

Character_Narrator.description: Lean man of middle years (about 35-45), pale sallow skin, dark disordered hair, sharp cheekbones, wide-set eyes unnaturally bright with an intense gleam; thin lips. Mid-19th-century men's dress: dark waistcoat unbuttoned at the throat over a white shirt, dark trousers, period boots; no modern detail.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Male, mid-30s to mid-40s; mid-to-high tense pitch that can drop into forced calm; quick precise diction with sudden emphatic spikes; nervous energy under a veneer of rational control—same voice in VO and on-camera confession.
Character_Narrator.visual_lock: Constants: lean middle-aged Caucasian male, pale skin, dark messy hair, unnaturally bright eyes, dark period waistcoat open at the collar. Must remain clearly distinct from the elderly white-haired Old Man and from the three uniformed officers—never aged into frailty, never given a filmed/milky eye.
wardrobe_always: dark mid-19th-century waistcoat unbuttoned at the throat
Character_Narrator.performance_notes: In confession room: direct address to implied listener/camera, leaning forward, hands on knees. In house scenes: false hearty kindness to the Old Man; later mounting panic before the officers while still trying to chat and smile.

Character_Old_Man.description: Elderly thin man, frail build, white hair, aged lined face; one pale blue eye with a milky film, the other eye ordinary. Soft dressing gown over nightclothes. Skin aged and pale.
Character_Old_Man.voice_profile: Elderly male; thin, reedy, quieter pitch; slow careful pace when calm (“Well enough”); sharp startled cry when afraid; whispered self-soothing mutters in the dark—same aged voice throughout.
Character_Old_Man.visual_lock: Constants: elderly thin white-haired man; unmistakable pale blue eye with milky veil/film over it; dressing-gown silhouette. Must never share the Narrator's dark disordered hair, lean middle-aged face, or waistcoat—always older, frailer, white-haired, dressing-gown silhouette.
wardrobe_always: bed coverlet when in bed — not base portrait
Character_Old_Man.performance_notes: Looks at Narrator or into the dark of his room, not at the confessional camera; terror is inward—listening, groaning, sitting bolt upright.

Character_Officer_Reynolds.description: Human male, senior middle age (about 45-55), calm composed face with a steady gaze, slightly greying hair at the temples, upright controlled bearing; mid-19th-century police coat and hat, dark uniform cloth, practical boots.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.voice_profile: Male, mature; even mid pitch, measured unhurried pace, polite official energy—calm suavity that does not rise with the Narrator’s panic.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.visual_lock: Constants: senior-aged male officer, calm composed expression, steady gaze, greying temples, upright controlled posture; mid-19th-century police coat and hat. Average build, not broad or heavyset; not elderly.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.performance_notes: Addresses Narrator and fellow officers in-scene; pleasant official mask until the confession, then looks to the floorboards.

Character_Officer_Hayes.description: Broad-built adult male police officer with a solid face, solid shoulders, and open eyes; mid-19th-century police coat and hat in period uniform. Physically heavier and wider build.
Character_Officer_Hayes.voice_profile: Male, adult; fuller lower-mid pitch, steady moderate pace, reserved watchful energy—speaks little; presence is physical and observant.
Character_Officer_Hayes.visual_lock: Constants: broad stocky adult male officer in mid-19th-century police coat and hat; period police uniform; heavier wider build is the distinguisher. Not lean; not elderly.
Character_Officer_Hayes.performance_notes: In-scene with partners; exchanges pleasant glances while Narrator unravels; first to move toward the planks when the mask drops.

Character_Officer_Clemm.description: Younger police officer, slimmer build, alert face; carries a small notebook. Mid-19th-century police coat and hat. Youthful, clean period grooming.
Character_Officer_Clemm.voice_profile: Male, younger adult; lighter mid pitch, crisp polite pace, restrained official energy—supports the senior officer rather than leading.
Character_Officer_Clemm.visual_lock: Constants: youngest of the three officers, slimmer build, period police coat and hat, notebook as signature prop. Distinct from broader or senior officers; never confused with a pale disordered civilian.
Character_Officer_Clemm.performance_notes: In-scene observation and note-taking; pleasant glance with Hayes during the chat; rises with the others at the confession.
